ddls:
CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the program */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Source type of the program (federal, state, local) */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the program is applicable */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the program is applicable */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the program is applicable */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the program (active, pending, expired) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the official program website */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or documentation about the program */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program category */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program source */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* The date the program becomes active */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* The date the program expires */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the program */,
  "application_process" TEXT /* Steps or processes required to apply for the program */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the program */,
  "max_benefit_amount" REAL /* The maximum amount of benefit a beneficiary can receive from the program */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date and time the program information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES program_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_programs_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES program_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the state record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the state record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the city is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the city record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the city record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the county record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the county record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the program type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the program type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the program type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eligibility_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each eligibility criteria */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the criteria applies to */,
  "income_limit" REAL /* Maximum income limit for eligibility */,
  "age_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum age limit for eligibility */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Maximum household size for eligibility */,
  "other_requirements" TEXT /* Other specific requirements for eligibility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the eligibility criteria record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the eligibility criteria record was last updated */,
  "citizenship_requirement" INTEGER /* Whether the program requires the applicant to be a citizen */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Specific employment status requirements (e.g., unemployed, employed, self-employed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eligibility_criteria_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the program source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the program source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the program source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., government official, community leader, beneficiary) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the user record was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The user's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* The user's physical address */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the user is located */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the user is located */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the user is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the program */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the program was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, apply) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the access log record was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address of the user accessing the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beneficiary */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who is the beneficiary */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the beneficiary applied for the program */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program the beneficiary applied for */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application (pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or documentation about the application */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the beneficiary record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the beneficiary record was last updated */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* The date the application was approved (if applicable) */,
  "rejection_reason" TEXT /* The reason for rejection (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_beneficiaries_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the program category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the program category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category mapping */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the program */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_category_mapping_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES program_categories ("category_id")
)
